spec.precondition: requires valid_range(bufts, 0, n_bufs) && n_bufs > 0 && n_bufs <= INT_MAX / sizeof(ggml_backend_buffer_type_t) && n_bufs <= INT_MAX / sizeof(struct vbuffer *) && n_bufs <= INT_MAX / sizeof(struct ggml_dyn_tallocr *) && forall i in 0..n_bufs: valid(bufts[i])
spec.postcondition: ensures valid(result) && result->n_buffers == n_bufs && valid_range(result->bufts, 0, n_bufs) && valid_range(result->buffers, 0, n_bufs) && valid_range(result->buf_tallocs, 0, n_bufs) && forall i in 0..n_bufs: result->bufts[i] == bufts[i] && valid(result->buf_tallocs[i])
